ratings.notes: "Good day, traveler! The rain has indeed thrown a wrench in our plans and left us with only two healing potion vials—a rare commodity now!"<TAB>"I understand your urgency," Elara continued while eyeing the apprentice scribbling furiously. "While I cannot offer discounts without proper reason, perhaps we can discuss a trade or find another way to assist each other."
